title: Ceti Modpack
description: Install this modpack to optimize the gaming experience.
body: # Ceti Modpack(CMP) Welcome to Ceti Modpack! This modpack is designed for players who wants to optimize the gaming experience.This modpack greatly optimized the graphics quality.Install this modpack and explore the endless world with your friends! # How to install? Search for **“cmp”** in the download screen of your launcher **(PCL or HMCL is recommended)**, select the correct version and click **“Install”**. Or you can download the modpack from the **“Versions”** page and install it on the launcher. For **PCL**: You can drag and drop the modpack directly into the launcher window. For **HMCL**: Hmm,I don't think I've ever used this launcher. # What mods are included? See **Dependencies** block in each version of publications. We've added AutoTranslation Mod to optimize the experience for non-English speakers. We've also added Iris Shaders Mod and such Mods(like sodium,indium...) to optimize the graphics quality.
